text.title: token-organization Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Component uses `var(--blue-500)`; dark-mode swap leaves button blue on dark surface.
antipattern.fix: Enforce no-primitive-in-component lint rule; rewrite to semantic alias.

antipattern.symptom: Tokens named `color-action-primary`; Style Dictionary cannot parse into hierarchy.
antipattern.root-cause: Author followed CSS variable convention instead of token convention.

antipattern.symptom: Hover styles hand-coded per component because tokens lack `.hover` variant.
Tier system added 'global' + 'foundation' + 'semantic' + 'component'; team forgets which to use.
antipattern.fix: Collapse to three tiers; document mapping codemod.
